title: lepisorus waltonii
intro: Lepisorus waltonii is a species of fern, specifically a member of the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the spleenwort ferns. Native to China, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus waltonii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for cardiovascular and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Lepisorus waltonii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
